**preprocess.py**: directly generated by gemini via sample code as prompt.<br>
**modeling.ipynb**: modeling for data from preprocess.py, auc-roc score = 0.95.<br>
**Feature generator.ipynb**: add extra features for data from preprocess.py, diff and ratio for lag in [-168,-24,-2,-1,1,2,24,168].<br>
**modeling_engineered.ipynb**: modeling for data from Feature generator.ipynb, auc-roc score = 0.95.<br>
These codes are modified or generated by AI from: <br>
https://github.com/buds-lab/LEAD-1st-solution <br>
and:<br>
https://github.com/buds-lab/ashrae-great-energy-predictor-3-solution-analysis/blob/master/solutions/rank-1/scripts/02_preprocess_data.py
